description: Search or read FHIR Condition records exposed by the configured FHIR server. For direct read, provide _id alone. For search, provide patient or encounter. Use category to narrow results, such as problem-list-item or encounter-diagnosis. Omitting category returns both types. Returns only resources permitted by the server and granted scopes.

searchParams._id: Condition resource ID — performs direct read when provided alone
searchParams.patient: Patient resource ID or reference — required unless encounter is provided
searchParams.encounter: Encounter resource ID — use instead of patient to get diagnoses for a specific encounter
searchParams.category: problem-list-item for problem list entries, encounter-diagnosis for encounter diagnoses; omit for both
searchParams.clinical-status: Clinical status: active, resolved, or inactive
searchParams.stage: Stage or grade of the condition (coded)
searchParams.verification-status: Verification status: unconfirmed, provisional, confirmed, refuted, entered-in-error
searchParams.asserter: Person or device that asserted the condition
